lane1_artifact_research_flag.accepted_dependency: external hipcc/LLD HSACO accepted only for research-flag use

requirements.fallback: flag off returns to default tinygrad decode

non_goals: not a portable tinygrad backend feature
not validated for other hidden sizes, quant formats, or GPU archs
not a replacement for native scheduler/codegen ownership
maintenance_actions: keep artifact source strings and hashes documented
rerun W==D and dNLL if source strings, toolchain, model shape, or graph route changes
do not generalize beyond gfx1100/Qwen3-8B dense Q4_K gate/up without a new scope

capabilities_required: register allocation and live-range control for low-VGPR high-occupancy kernels
global load grouping/coalescing as part of scheduling, not a standalone knob
staged reductions and post-barrier multi-output stores
SQTT/PMU attribution good enough to assign >=30us movement to a bounded feature

phase_plan.deliverable: machine-readable diff between artifact oracle, COMGR, and tinygrad AMD DSL schedules
phase_plan.gate: diff labels instruction groups, load widths, wait placement, resources, and timing without manual prose

phase_plan.deliverable: PMU/SQTT or deterministic proxy that attributes >=30us to one scheduler feature
phase_plan.gate: one feature has measured or attributed >=30us movement

phase_plan.deliverable: one backend capability implemented behind an AMD-only experimental flag
phase_plan.gate: q8 consumer improves by >=25us and remains correct

lane2_native_project.start_gate: Do not start native transfer until one bounded feature has >=30us measured or attributed movement, or the project funds the whole AMD backend scheduler effort.
